problem_solved: Legacy 911 systems cannot handle modern communication methods (video, text, location data) and lack AI-powered tools to assist dispatchers during high-stress emergency calls
solution_description: Cloud-native NG911 platform (APEX) providing all-in-one emergency communications with rich media support, AI-powered call handling, real-time translation, video streaming, and integrated mapping for mission-critical contact centers. Includes AI Studio for workflow automation and Admin Assist for call summarization
traction_signals: Deployed in Miami-Dade, Atlanta, Orlando, multiple state agencies
notes: Next-gen 911 infrastructure leader. Cloud-native architecture with 99.999% reliability. Strong AI capabilities for transcription, translation, and call analysis. High Varden fit for modernizing emergency dispatch infrastructure.
